dashboard.title: URBS - Panel de Bienestar Urbano A Coruña

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_index, NO2Concentration FROM mturbs.ettrafficenvironmentimpact ORDER BY time_index DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT time_index, intensity FROM mturbs.ettrafficflowobserved ORDER BY time_index DESC LIMIT 100

targets.rawSql: SELECT entity_id, PM25Concentration FROM mturbs.ettrafficenvironmentimpact GROUP BY entity_id
SELECT time_index, entity_id, NO2Concentration FROM mturbs.ettrafficenvironmentimpact WHERE NO2Concentration > 80 ORDER BY time_index DESC LIMIT 10
